review.title: Spaced repetition
review.subtitle: Spaced repetition system based on the SM-2 algorithm
review.howItWorksDescription: The SM-2 system calculates the best time to review each concept. The more you succeed, the longer the interval.
review.rateRecall: How well did you recall this?

howItWorksSteps.step1: 1. Complete capsules to add them to your reviews
howItWorksSteps.step2: 2. The SM-2 algorithm calculates the optimal time to review
howItWorksSteps.step3: 3. Rate your recall from 0 (no memory) to 5 (perfect)
howItWorksSteps.step4: 4. Intervals adapt: the more you retain, the less you review
